nodes.title: get_chat_history reads chat_history/extracted_params off Campaign instead of CampaignSession
finalize_session handler passes user.id but ChatService.finalize_session takes no user_id param

dag.rationale: Two failing tests, two independent bugs in two different files; empty depends_on so both fix nodes run in parallel, then a single verify checkpoint (all_of join).

fixes.change_summary: Load the CampaignSession via campaign_repo.get_session(campaign_id) after the 404 ownership check and return session.chat_history / session.extracted_params (with [] / {} fallbacks). Initial assistant message already seeded at campaign creation.
Removed the extraneous user.id positional arg from the finalize_session(...) call at campaigns.py:141 (preferred minimal fix at the call site, since the service does not scope by user).
